page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs, which map to 2 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core. The instance features 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance type does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. It also does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Due to the dedicated CPU allocation, the instance provides predictable compute performance without the resource contention typical of shared-core or burstable configurations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance as a resource-dense option for memory-bound workloads that do not require high compute core counts. It is suitable for small-scale databases, caching layers, lightweight enterprise applications, and memory-sensitive background processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.2xlarge is an x86_64 virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor, featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory. With a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, this instance is designed for memory-optimized workloads that require stable, dedicated compute resources without the overhead of multi-threading. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance, making it a reliable choice for memory-sensitive applications. It is well-suited for workloads such as small databases, in-memory caching, and lightweight enterprise applications that benefit from a higher memory-to-CPU ratio.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.2xlarge is a KVM-based x86_64 virtual server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, optimized for memory-sensitive workloads and small databases.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual server featuring sixteen gigabytes of memory, optimized for memory-intensive workloads requiring predictable compute performance.
